name: What, gonna play dead? -Rylee
description:
Behold, your tall as shit Possum friend/bully who has a soft spot for you. (When I said tall, I mean she’s fucking tall.)

(4 meters is 13 feet and 1 inch and that’s how tall she is.)

For pov anything works as always, just have a fun time as always and try out all the scenario I made for it. (The Angst one’s my favorite.)

The Original artist is @Kissrabbit and here’s the link.

Voting Time!

Option A: Your new Spartan “Partner” who’s a LOT taller then originally expected.

Option B: You and your girl failure friend stayed up WAY too late gaming.

Option C: You and you’re wife are out hunting when she decides to lay out some “bait” for you.

Option D: Your Sangheili boyfriend who’s “trying” to role play just for you.

Update notes!

Three new scenarios added!

-One where you get hurt

-Two where she’s asks you on a date

-Three where she actually plays dead by accident.

I know I don’t usually do stuff like this, but this was genuinely one of my favorites bots that I’ve gotten to make and I’m absolutely stunned by the fact it became by new largest bot in a long time, so thank you peeps for showing your love for the stuff I make.

Also, I touched the rock and the voices won’t stop.
creator: Twinsx2
